# Package APIs

OpenWiki's stable public contracts are the CLI, HTTP API, MCP tools, JSON
schemas, repository format, static export artifacts, and release artifacts. The
workspace packages are private implementation packages used inside the
monorepo. Their top-level exports exist for package-to-package composition and
tests; they are not npm library APIs until a release explicitly marks them
stable.

## Public Versus Internal

| Surface | Stability |
| --- | --- |
| `openwiki` CLI commands in [CLI Reference](cli.md) | Supported preview. |
| HTTP routes in [HTTP API](http-api.md) and `openapi.json` | Supported preview. |
| MCP tools in [MCP Tools](mcp-tools.md) | Supported preview. |
| `schemas/openwiki/v0/*.schema.json` | Supported preview schema contract. |
| Git repository layout in [Repository Format](repo-format.md) | Supported preview format. |
| Static export artifacts in [Schemas And Static Artifacts](schemas.md) | Supported preview output contract. |
| `packages/*/src` exports | Internal workspace API unless listed in a future library compatibility policy. |

## Workspace Packages

| Package | Directory | Private | Export shape | Internal dependencies |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `@openwiki/cli` | `packages/cli` | yes | none | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/harness-opencode`, `@openwiki/http-api`, `@openwiki/index-store`, `@openwiki/jobs`, `@openwiki/mcp-server`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/skills`, `@openwiki/static-export`, `@openwiki/validation`, `@openwiki/workflows` |
| `@openwiki/connectors` | `packages/connectors` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core` |
| `@openwiki/core` | `packages/core` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | None |
| `@openwiki/git` | `packages/git` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/repo` |
| `@openwiki/harness-opencode` | `packages/harness-opencode` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/workflows` |
| `@openwiki/http-api` | `packages/http-api` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/index-store`, `@openwiki/jobs`, `@openwiki/mcp-server`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/storage`, `@openwiki/static-export`, `@openwiki/validation`, `@openwiki/web`, `@openwiki/workflows` |
| `@openwiki/index-store` | `packages/index-store` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/repo` |
| `@openwiki/jobs` | `packages/jobs` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/connectors`, `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/index-store`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/static-export`, `@openwiki/validation`, `@openwiki/workflows` |
| `@openwiki/mcp-server` | `packages/mcp-server` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/connectors`, `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/index-store`, `@openwiki/jobs`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/static-export`, `@openwiki/validation`, `@openwiki/workflows` |
| `@openwiki/policy` | `packages/policy` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core` |
| `@openwiki/postgres-runtime` | `packages/postgres-runtime` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/repo` |
| `@openwiki/repo` | `packages/repo` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/skills`, `@openwiki/storage` |
| `@openwiki/search` | `packages/search` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo` |
| `@openwiki/skills` | `packages/skills` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | None |
| `@openwiki/static-export` | `packages/static-export` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/web` |
| `@openwiki/storage` | `packages/storage` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core` |
| `@openwiki/validation` | `packages/validation` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/connectors`, `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/repo` |
| `@openwiki/web` | `packages/web` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/core` |
| `@openwiki/workflows` | `packages/workflows` | yes | `./src/index.ts` | `@openwiki/connectors`, `@openwiki/core`, `@openwiki/git`, `@openwiki/index-store`, `@openwiki/policy`, `@openwiki/postgres-runtime`, `@openwiki/repo`, `@openwiki/search`, `@openwiki/skills`, `@openwiki/storage`, `@openwiki/validation` |

Boundary tests enforce direct dependency declarations and package layering so
internal helpers do not become accidental public dependency paths.
